library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: the artifact is a tiny Quarkus bootstrap/classloader utility exposing only ClassLoaderHelper static methods, with no runtime dependencies beyond java.base and no external service or configuration requirement.
risks: The reported failure was dependency resolution for 3.37.0.CR1 rather than a compile error requiring test setup; if it recurs, it is likely repository propagation/cache availability rather than missing scaffold preparation.
Coverage is naturally limited to pure class-name/resource-name conversion and JDK-package predicate behavior because the artifact contains only the classloader helper API.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8304 [Automation] javac compile fails for io.quarkus:quarkus-classloader-commons:3.37.0.CR1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
